title: Chamber Refurbished
description: An update to the chambers to fix and refine their gameplay and design
body:
# Chamber Refurbished

**A chamber overhaul datapack which focuses on updating several weak parts about it**, refines several parts of the experience and give it a more hand made polished gameplay

**It sticks close to vanilla chambers while still implementing a lot**, plenty of the additions may seem small but result in a more enriching structure

### Note worthy features
- Added a new chamber rooms with a big focus on verticality as well as redesigned most of the vanilla chamber rooms to make them more challenging but fair
- Doubled the variety of pieces on the main hallway to make chambers more interesting as well as redesigned all the vanilla ones to allow for more fun opportunities
- Redesigned the center rooms with the beds to keep them all equally filled with content as well as added a new one
- Added a light post on the surface to indicate a chamber as well as made chambers slightly rarer to compensate this
- Added trial spawner particles around mobs spawned by trial spawners to make them easier to find (this should also apply to DnT structures)
- Added a recipe to craft the flow banner pattern with a wind charge and paper
- Reworked plenty of the loot with a focus on keeping the cosmetic novelty items rare/sparse while the useful loot is more consistent
- Several technical changes and new structure pieces to fix technical issues with vanilla chamber and provide more variety
